# SynergY — Full Project Notes

## Project
- **Path**: `D:/Claude/collab-writing`
- **Repo**: https://github.com/TaVlala/Synergy-Writing.git
- **Start servers**:
  - Frontend: `npm run dev` in `client/` (port 5173)
  - Backend: `node index.js` in `server/` (port 3001)
  - Preview server name: `collab-writing-client`

## Architecture
- **client/src/App.jsx** — UserContext provider, `collab_user` localStorage key, `login()` / `logout()`
- **client/src/pages/Home.jsx** — create/join room, color picker
- **client/src/pages/Room.jsx** — main room page (heavy: all state, socket listeners, API calls)
- **client/src/components/**
  - `ChatSidebar.jsx` — collapsible live chat (isOpen/onToggle props)
  - `ContributorsPanel.jsx` — modal overlay; active + removed members; Remove button for admin
  - `ReviewView.jsx` — pending/approve/reject/reorder contributions
  - `ContributionItem.jsx` — single contribution card with reactions, comments, edit/delete
  - `ChatView.jsx` — collab feed view
- **server/index.js** — all Express routes + Socket.io events
- **server/db.js** — JSON file store with atomic `save()`, collections in EMPTY schema
- **server/data/db.json** — runtime data (not committed)

## DB Collections (EMPTY schema)
`users, rooms, contributions, comments, reactions, notifications, chat_messages, room_members`

## Room Schema
```js
{ id, title, creator_id, is_locked, is_entry_locked, created_at }
```

## Room Member Schema
```js
{ id, room_id, user_id, user_name, user_color, joined_at, removed_at (null if active) }
```

## Contribution Schema
```js
{ id, room_id, user_id, user_name, user_color, content, status ('approved'|'pending'|'rejected'), sort_order, created_at, updated_at }
```

## API Endpoints (key ones)
| Method | Path | Description |
|--------|------|-------------|
| POST | `/api/users` | upsert user by id |
| POST | `/api/rooms` | create room |
| GET | `/api/rooms/:id` | get room |
| PATCH | `/api/rooms/:id` | update `is_locked`, `is_entry_locked`, `title` |
| POST | `/api/rooms/:id/join` | register/update membership; enforces entry lock + removal |
| GET | `/api/rooms/:id/members` | list all members with contribution_count |
| DELETE | `/api/rooms/:id/members/:userId` | admin-only remove; emits `member_removed` |
| POST | `/api/rooms/:id/contributions` | add contribution; checks post lock + removed status |
| PATCH | `/api/rooms/:id/contributions/:cid` | edit content or change status (approve/reject) |
| DELETE | `/api/rooms/:id/contributions/:cid` | delete own contribution |
| POST | `/api/rooms/:id/contributions/reorder` | admin reorder; body: `{ order: [id, id, ...] }` |
| GET/POST | `/api/rooms/:id/chat` | get/send chat messages |

## Socket Events
| Event | Direction | Payload |
|-------|-----------|---------|
| `join_room` | client→server | `{ room_id }` |
| `new_contribution` | server→client | contribution object |
| `contribution_updated` | server→client | contribution object |
| `contribution_deleted` | server→client | `{ id }` |
| `contribution_status_changed` | server→client | contribution object |
| `contributions_reordered` | server→client | `{ order: [...] }` |
| `new_chat_message` | server→client | message object |
| `member_joined` | server→client | `{ user_id, user_name, user_color }` |
| `member_removed` | server→client | `{ user_id }` |

## Features Implemented (as of Feb 2026)
1. **Create/join rooms** with optional title
2. **Collab view** — real-time contribution feed with reactions + comments
3. **Document view** — clean read-only document from approved contributions
4. **Review Mode** — admin approves/rejects/reorders pending contributions
5. **Collapsible live chat sidebar** — » / « toggle, collapses to 40px
6. **User color selection** — 8 color swatches on home page
7. **Edit own contributions** — inline edit with pencil button
8. **Dual locks** (admin only):
   - 🚪 **Entry lock** (`is_entry_locked`) — blocks new members from joining
   - ✏️ **Post lock** (`is_locked`) — blocks new contributions
9. **Contributors panel** (`👥 N` button):
   - Active members: avatar, name, contribution count, YOU/ADMIN badges, Remove button (admin)
   - Removed members section (admin only): shows removed_at time + REMOVED badge
10. **Export** — download document as text
11. **Share** — copy room link
12. **Notifications bell**
13. **Dark/light theme toggle**

## CSS Classes to Know
- `.lock-btn` / `.lock-btn--active` — amber when locked
- `.contributors-btn` — header button for contributors panel
- `.contributors-overlay` / `.contributors-panel` — full panel with slideInRight animation
- `.contributor-badge--you` / `--admin` / `--removed`
- `.contributor-remove-btn`
- `.chat-sidebar--collapsed` — width: 40px
- `.review-view` — Review Mode layout

## Known Gotchas
- localStorage key is `collab_user` (not `synergy_user`)
- Backwards compat: contributions without `status` field treated as `'approved'`
- `sort_order` falls back to `created_at` if not set
- Entry lock allows existing members through even when locked (only blocks brand-new members)
- `db.json` is NOT committed to git (runtime data)

Pushed (`b30a620`). Here's what the feature does end-to-end:

- **Author edits an approved contribution** → amber warning shows: *"⚠️ Saving will remove this from the document until re-approved by admin."*
- **On save** → server resets `status: 'pending'` and clears `sort_order` → contribution disappears from Document view instantly (via socket `contribution_updated` event)
- **Admin sees it in Review** → pending queue, can approve/reject as usual
- **On re-approval** → it's back in the document

content.text:
Pushed (`316b401`). Here's how it works end-to-end:

- **When you enter a room** → `user_online` emitted to server → server adds you to the presence map → broadcasts `presence_update` to everyone in the room
- **When you leave/disconnect** → server detects via `disconnect` or `leave_room` → removes you → broadcasts updated presence
- **Avatars** → stacked circles with your color, green online dot, tooltip with name on hover
- **Your own avatar** → highlighted with a purple ring so you can spot yourself
- **6+ people** → shows 5 avatars + `+N` overflow bubble

content.thinking:
Now I have a clear picture. Let me plan the implementation:

**Plan:**

1. **Server (`server/index.js`)**:
   - Add a new `PATCH /api/rooms/:id/pin` endpoint (or add `pin` action to existing PATCH)
   - When a contribution is pinned:
     - Clear `pinned: true` from all contributions in that room
     - Set `pinned: true` on the target contribution
   - When a contribution is unpinned: Set `pinned: false`
   - Emit `contribution_updated` for affected contributions
   - Only the room creator can pin
   
I'm debating the cleanest API design—whether to use a dedicated endpoint like `PATCH /api/rooms/:roomId/contributions/:id/pin` or keep it simpler with `PATCH /api/rooms/:roomId/pin` and pass the contribution ID in the body. I think the latter is cleaner, so I'll go with that approach.

Now I'm mapping out the component structure: the Room component will handle the pin logic, pass it down through ChatView to ContributionItem where the pin button lives, and I need to add a `pinned` field to the database schema. The pinned contribution should display at the top as a special banner before the rest of the list.

For the data model, storing `pinned: boolean` directly on each contribution is simpler than adding a `pinned_contribution_id` to the room—when pinning a new one, I'll just unpin all others first. On the socket side, I'll emit `contribution_updated` events to sync the pinned state across clients since that event is already being handled.

For the UI, I'm adding a pin button (📌) in the contribution header that's only visible to admins, a "Pinned" badge on the contribution itself, and special styling to float it to the top of the feed. Clicking the pin button toggles the state.

Now I'm building the server endpoint...

Setting up the pin logic... Writing the ChatView component...

content.text:
Clean picture. Here's my plan:
- `pinned: boolean` field on contributions (one pinned per room at a time)
- New server endpoint `PATCH /api/rooms/:roomId/contributions/:id/pin`  
- Pinned contribution floats to the **top of collab view** with a `📌 Pinned` banner
- Pin/unpin button visible only to admin in the contribution header
- Socket `contribution_updated` propagates the change in real-time to everyone
